action.reasoning: Observation: Iter6 train.py crashed with KLDivLoss shape mismatch at Task1 (student 20 vs teacher 10). Analysis: The teacher model (previous classifier output size = old_classes) produces logits of shape [B, old_classes], but student logits are [B, total_seen_classes]. We must slice student logits to old_classes before computing distillation loss. Also, NME evaluation at Task0 gave only 0.0416, likely due to using exemplar means too early; need to train full epochs before computing means. Decision: Rewrite train.py with corrected distillation (slice student logits), keep 200 exemplars/class, 20 epochs/task, NME for val monitoring and checkpoint selection, and save class_means for predict.py. Then run training and submit eval to see NME gain over previous linear classifier (0.4655).
